name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
creator: Anthropic
description: Claude 3.5 Sonnet stands out for its exceptional blend of intelligence and speed, making it a favorite for complex agentic workflows and tool-use integration. It excels in contextual understanding, multimodal reasoning, and has seen rapid developer adoption for tasks requiring advanced problem-solving at scale.

name: GPT-4o
creator: OpenAI
description: GPT-4o is a versatile flagship model known for its multimodal capabilities, excelling in vision, audio, and text understanding. Its speed, cost-effectiveness, and broad API availability make it a go-to for rapid prototyping, real-time agent interactions, and integrating complex tools across diverse applications.

name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
creator: Google
description: Gemini 1.5 Pro is renowned for its massive context window and advanced multimodal reasoning, allowing it to process entire codebases, long documents, and video streams. It's a powerhouse for deep analysis, long-context agentic reasoning, and complex information retrieval tasks, popular among enterprises for its robust performance.

name: DeepSeek-V3
creator: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek-V3 is an open-source marvel, offering exceptional reasoning and coding capabilities at an incredibly competitive price point. Its strong performance in logical tasks and code generation, combined with its accessibility, makes it a prime candidate for cost-sensitive autonomous agents and developer-driven innovation.

name: Llama 3.1 405B
creator: Meta
description: Llama 3.1 405B represents Meta's leading open-source offering, designed for on-premise deployments and fine-tuning. Its massive parameter count provides strong general intelligence and robust performance across a wide range of agentic tasks, making it a critical choice for organizations requiring full control and customization.

name: Qwen 2.5 72B
creator: Alibaba
description: Qwen 2.5 72B is a highly efficient open-source model from Alibaba, noted for its strong multilingual capabilities and solid performance in a variety of complex autonomous tasks. Its balance of power and efficiency makes it suitable for global agent deployments and scenarios requiring deep linguistic understanding.

name: Mistral Large 2
creator: Mistral
description: Mistral Large 2 offers a potent blend of advanced reasoning and coding capabilities, positioning it as a strong contender for high-performance agentic workflows. Known for its efficient architecture and European focus, it provides robust solutions for complex problem-solving and integration into enterprise systems.

name: Claude 4.8 Opus (Next-Gen)
creator: Anthropic
description: Claude 4.8 Opus is Anthropic's next-generation flagship, designed for the most demanding autonomous agent tasks. It pushes the boundaries of long-context reasoning, safety, and complex tool orchestration, offering unparalleled reliability and cognitive depth for enterprise-grade applications and scientific discovery.

name: GPT-5.5 (Next-Gen)
creator: OpenAI
description: GPT-5.5 represents the pinnacle of OpenAI's advancements, setting new benchmarks for general intelligence, coding proficiency, and complex reasoning. Optimized for next-generation autonomous agents, it offers unparalleled performance in multi-step problem-solving, advanced tool integration, and human-level interaction across all modalities.

name: DeepSeek-R1
creator: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek-R1 is DeepSeek's cutting-edge open-source model, pushing the limits of reasoning and coding capabilities for the community. It offers state-of-the-art performance, rivaling proprietary models in complex benchmarks, making it an excellent choice for advanced open-source agent development and high-performance custom solutions.
